name: Variant B (re-run): plan_and_solve_v3 with bounded plan-recovery chain
short_description: Re-run of variant B on the 130 paired t0026 instances using the new plan_and_solve_v3 library, which adds a 3-attempt plan-parse fallback chain (clean -> re-prompt -> JSON-mode) to fix the MalformedPlanError defect (S-0026-01) that collapsed 16/130 paired runs in t0026.
model_description: claude-sonnet-4-6 via Anthropic API (CLI transport). max_turns=10, max_tokens=4096. The agent is plan_and_solve_v3 (built in this task as an upgrade to t0021's plan_and_solve_v2) which introduces a bounded 3-attempt plan-parse recovery chain: attempt 1 is the standard PS+ template; attempt 2 re-prompts with a corrective preamble; attempt 3 forces JSON-mode parsing as a structural fallback. The agent only re-raises MalformedPlanError if all three attempts fail. The first/second/third attempt outcome is recorded in the per-instance plan_parser_recovery_path field. Note: model is claude-sonnet-4-6 to match what t0026 actually ran; the original t0027 task description erroneously stated claude-opus-4-7 and was corrected after discovering the mismatch via t0026's paths.py.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: instance_id (str), subset (str), variant (str), final_answer (str|null), final_confidence (float|null; 0..1 verbalised confidence), cost_usd (float), trajectory_path (str|null; absolute path to the per-instance trajectory JSON in data/runs/b/), judge_sonnet_success (bool), judge_sonnet_rationale (str), plan_parser_recovery_path (str; one of 'clean', 'reprompt', 'json_mode', 'all_failed', 'unknown'), plan_parser_attempts (int; 1..3), raised_malformed_plan_error (bool; True iff all three plan-parse attempts failed and the agent re-raised).

files.description: Per-instance predictions for variant B on the 130-paired set (SWE+Tau+FS) with the primary sonnet judge verdict attached and the new plan_parser_recovery_path/plan_parser_attempts fields recording the v3 fallback-chain outcome for each instance.
